review: Works offline and syncs when I get back to WiFi — essential for fieldwork.
The highlight reel feature is genuinely useful for presentations. The voice memo feature captures context I'd otherwise lose.
No built-in way to generate a structured debrief template from tags.
One-click export to Notion is a feature I use every week. I was running my first study within 20 minutes of signing up.
Solid core product with rough edges in the advanced workflows.
Template library covers most of my research formats out of the box. The guest access feature is perfect for external stakeholders.
Documentation for advanced filtering could be much clearer.
Loading large projects takes noticeably longer than it used to.
My whole team can comment on the same session without chaos.
Screener templates saved me from writing survey questions from scratch. The session recording is crisp and easy to scrub through.
